nasb.text: Grain for bread is crushed, Indeed, he does not continue to thresh it forever. Because the wheel of his cart and his horses eventually damage it, He does not thresh it longer.

esv.text: Does one crush grain for bread? No, he does not thresh it forever; when he drives his cart wheel over it with his horses, he does not crush it.

cnv.text: 做餅的穀粒怎麼要碾碎的呢？ 從來沒有人碾碎它們， 雖然他讓車輪和馬匹輥過穀粒， 卻不會把他們碾碎。

ccb.text: 做饼的粮食要磨碎， 没有人会不停地在场上碾压粮食。 马拉着石磙在场上轧过， 也不会把麦子磨碎。

csbs.text: 做饼用的谷粒是要磨碎的， 就算人一直不停地脱打谷粒， 甚至用碾轮和马压过，也不能磨碎它。
